GG0170B1_SIT_STRT_CD GG0170B1 Mobility: Sit to Lying at SOC/ROC Indicates the patient's ability to move from a sitting to lying position at the start ofcare/resumption of care. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
05. Setup or clean-up assistance – Helper sets up or cleans up; patient completes activity. Helper assists only prior to or following the activity.
04. Supervision or touching
